_comment: DRAFT compression FieldBaseline spec — extends the fulcrum scoreboard/run FieldBaseline shape (examples/first-run-baseline.spec.json) with a SECOND measured axis (compressed output_bytes) and a level-class dimension. Subject COMPRESSES the plaintext corpora; comparators compress the same input; the correctness arm ROUND-TRIPS each output through TWO independent decompressors + RFC-1952 + records output_bytes (exact). Box paths are placeholders — resolve at staging. UNVERIFIED thread caps (igzip -T, bgzip -@) are resolved by the day-1 capability probes before --live. This is one file with a per-box override block; a real run may split per host.

subject.label: gzippy-native
subject.note: gzippy compresses stdin->stdout; -p {t} threads, -{level} level. ISA-L C0 only where isal_compress::is_available() (x86).

canonicalize_note: review D8: invoke every tool with mtime=0 and no name/comment (gzip -n and equivalents; gzippy no header info) so header-METADATA bytes are constant across tools. Count full .gz output bytes; structural framing bytes (GZ FEXTRA subfield, multi-member/pipelined headers) ARE counted - they are the real cost of parallel-decodability, i.e. the ratio-vs-speed trade the 2-D verdict prices.

level_classes._comment: review D4: NESTED QUALITY-TARGET constraints, not a partition. Each class = target r <= r(anchor) measured per corpus at run time (r=out/in, SMALLER is better). Targets nest C3<=C2<=C1<=C0. A (tool,level) point QUALIFIES for every class whose target it meets. BAND-WIN(class) = a gzippy point is Pareto-best (fastest at-or-below target, none simultaneously smaller AND faster) among all points meeting the target. Anchors validated per corpus (D5): assert r(gzip1)>=r(gzip6)>=r(gzip9)>=r(zopfli); on inversion mark boundary INVALID and merge.

comparators.threads_max_UNVERIFIED: probe: igzip --help | grep -i thread; if absent set threads_max=1
probe: bgzip --help | grep -E '@|level'; if absent set threads_max=1

oracle.rfc1952: magic 1f8b, CM=8, trailer ISIZE == input_len mod 2^32, trailer CRC32 == crc32(input)

determinism_preflight.assert: sha256(gzippy output) identical across K runs for fixed (input,level,T)

boxes.field_note: arm64: NO ISA-L (gzippy C0 = libdeflate); igzip likely ABSENT -> drop from field (UNVERIFIED). LocalRunner smoke of the full 2-D loop.
x86: ISA-L available. Full field incl igzip. LOAD-IMMUNE measure (do NOT pause llama beyond quiesce guard).
x86: ISA-L available. Full field incl igzip. 7 independent P-cores.
